title: Process routes and filing depth phase
summary: Forty-seventh structured packet for Eco Explorer. This lane-4 wave starts by converting `forest-cool-edge` into the first process-backed Route v2 outing, reusing the live `moisture-hold` seam as soft opportunity, then deepens the notebook filing payoff through clue-backed filed-note text derived from saved route evidence instead of temporary process framing.

execution_order.goal: Prepare the first process-backed Route v2 conversion.
execution_order.why_now: The next gameplay gain is one outing that asks the player to notice ecological process, not just carriers or locations.

execution_order.goal: Implement `forest-cool-edge` as the first process-backed outing.
execution_order.why_now: It already overlaps the live `moisture-hold` process seam at Creek Bend, so the outing can become more ecological without new save state or a new route type.

execution_order.goal: Review the process-backed Route v2 outing.
execution_order.why_now: The outing needs to stay soft, clear, and truthful to the world-state seam.
Once a stronger outing type lands, the next gain is a slightly richer notebook return.

execution_order.goal: Implement clue-backed filed-note synthesis for the filing return.
execution_order.why_now: The return filing should feel a little more like synthesis, not only confirmation, and it should stay stable even when the temporary moisture window is gone.
The loop should feel more authored and satisfying without becoming quiz-like or cluttered.

guardrails: Use world-state as soft opportunity, not hard punishment.
Do not add timers, failure states, or a larger station shell.
Keep the filing step notebook-first and one-screen.
Avoid broad new route ledgers or inventory systems.
acceptance_focus: One live outing uses ecological process or condition as soft gameplay texture.
`forest-cool-edge` becomes the first process-backed Route v2 beat by reusing `moisture-hold` softly.
The notebook filing return feels a little richer through clue-backed filed note text without more shell.
The richer filed note stays independent of temporary process-window framing.
Lane 4 stays cozy, notebook-first, and game-like.
handoff_prompt: Read AGENTS.md, .agents/lane-runner.md, .agents/project-memory.md, .agents/work-queue.md, .agents/lanes/lane-4.md, docs/reports/2026-03-31-process-routes-and-filing-depth-phase.md, docs/reports/2026-03-31-forest-cool-edge-process-route-handoff.md, docs/reports/2026-03-31-filing-depth-follow-on-handoff.md, and this packet. Treat this as lane 4's next gameplay-loop wave: convert `forest-cool-edge` into the first process-backed Route v2 outing by reusing the live `moisture-hold` seam softly, then deepen the notebook filing payoff through clue-backed filed-note text derived from saved route evidence instead of temporary process framing.
